questions.transcript: Attention passengers traveling on Flight 452 to Singapore. Boarding will begin at Gate 12 in approximately fifteen minutes. Please have your boarding passes and identification ready before entering the boarding area. Passengers requiring special assistance may board first. Thank you for your cooperation.
questions.prompt: What is the announcement mainly about?
questions.explanationEn: The announcement explains when boarding begins, what passengers should prepare, and who may board first.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: "Announcement: Airport Boarding / What is the announcement mainly about?"에서는 한국어로 바꿔 생각하면 늦어질 수 있습니다. 문제 유형에 맞춰 숫자, 장소, 요청 표현, 다음 행동을 영어 그대로 잡으세요.

vocabularyItems.word: What is the announcement mainly about
vocabularyItems.meaningKo: 핵심 표현: What is the announcement mainly about
vocabularyItems.meaningJa: アナウンスは主に何についてですか
vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: What is the announcement mainly about

questions.explanationKo: 정답은 B. A boarding procedure입니다. 음성에서는 "Attention passengers traveling on Flight 452 to Singapore. Boarding will begin at Gate 12 in approximately fifteen minut" 부분이 단서입니다. 선택지 "A boarding procedure"이 설문에서 요구한 정보와 가장 잘 맞습니다. 대화나 안내문에서는 숫자, 장소, 요청, 다음 행동처럼 문제 유형에 맞는 정보만 집중해서 들어야 합니다.
questions.explanationJa: 正解は B. A boarding procedure です。音声では「Attention passengers traveling on Flight 452 to Singapore. Boarding will begin at Gate 12 in approximately fifteen minut」が手がかりです。選択肢「A boarding procedure」は、設問で求められている情報と一致します。会話や説明文では、数字・場所・依頼・次の行動など、設問の種類に合う情報だけを狙って聞くのが有効です。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 「Announcement: Airport Boarding」では、日本語に置き換えてから考えると遅れやすいので、設問の種類に合わせて数字・場所・依頼表現・次の行動を英語のまま拾いましょう。

questions.transcript: Hello Mr. Carter, this is Emily from Westside Auto Repair. I'm calling to let you know that your vehicle has been repaired and is ready for pickup. We replaced the front brake pads and completed the oil change you requested. Our office closes at 6 p.m. today, but you may also pick up the car tomorrow morning after 8 a.m. Thank you.
questions.prompt: Why is Emily calling?
options: C. To announce that repairs are complete
questions.explanationEn: Emily says the vehicle has been repaired and is ready for pickup.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: "Voicemail: Auto Repair / Why is Emily calling?"에서는 한국어로 바꿔 생각하면 늦어질 수 있습니다. 문제 유형에 맞춰 숫자, 장소, 요청 표현, 다음 행동을 영어 그대로 잡으세요.

questions.transcript: Brightstar Electronics is closed today because of a national holiday. The store will open tomorrow at 9 A.M.
questions.prompt: What is the announcement mainly about?
options: C. A change in branch ownership.
questions.explanationEn: The announcement says Brightstar Electronics is closed because of a national holiday.
questions.explanationKo: 안내문은 Brightstar Electronics가 재고 작업 때문에 이번 토요일에 임시 휴점한다고 말합니다.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: announcement 문제에서는 첫 문장에 전체 목적이 나오는 경우가 많습니다.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: The store will be closed this Saturday.
The store is closed because of a national holiday.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: The store will be closed this Saturday.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は A. A temporary store closure. です。音声では「Brightstar Electronics is closed today because of a national holiday. The store will open tomorrow at 9 A.M.」が手がかりです。選択肢「A temporary store closure.」は、設問で求められている情報と一致します。会話や説明文では、数字・場所・依頼・次の行動など、設問の種類に合う情報だけを狙って聞くのが有効です。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 「Announcement: Brightstar Closure」では、日本語に置き換えてから考えると遅れやすいので、設問の種類に合わせて数字・場所・依頼表現・次の行動を英語のまま拾いましょう。

questions.transcript: Good afternoon shoppers. Today only, all winter jackets on the second floor are available at a twenty percent discount. questions.explanationKo: 정답은 D. A gift card입니다. 음성에서는 "Good afternoon shoppers. Today only, all winter jackets on the second floor are available at a twenty percent discount. " 부분이 단서입니다. 선택지 "A gift card"이 설문에서 요구한 정보와 가장 잘 맞습니다. 대화나 안내문에서는 숫자, 장소, 요청, 다음 행동처럼 문제 유형에 맞는 정보만 집중해서 들어야 합니다.
questions.explanationJa: 正解は D. A gift card です。音声では「Good afternoon shoppers. Today only, all winter jackets on the second floor are available at a twenty percent discount. 」が手がかりです。選択肢「A gift card」は、設問で求められている情報と一致します。会話や説明文では、数字・場所・依頼・次の行動など、設問の種類に合う情報だけを狙って聞くのが有効です。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 「Announcement: Store Sale」では、日本語に置き換えてから考えると遅れやすいので、設問の種類に合わせて数字・場所・依頼表現・次の行動を英語のまま拾いましょう。

questions.transcript: Attention passengers. The express train to Busan will depart from platform 6 at 3:20 P.M. Passengers with reserved seats should board cars one through five. Food service will not be available on this train, so passengers may purchase snacks before boarding.
questions.prompt: What is the announcement mainly about?
options: A. Boarding information for a train to Busan.
B. A delayed flight to Busan.
C. A new restaurant at the station.
questions.explanationEn: The announcement gives departure, platform, boarding, and food-service information for a train to Busan.
questions.explanationKo: 안내 방송은 부산행 열차의 출발, 플랫폼, 탑승, 음식 서비스 정보를 제공합니다.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: station announcement에서는 platform, depart, board 같은 단어가 핵심입니다.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: The train will depart from platform 6.
Passengers with reserved seats should board first.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: The train will depart from platform 6.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は A. Boarding information for a train to Busan. です。音声では「Attention passengers. The express train to Busan will depart from platform 6 at 3:20 P.M. Passengers with reserved seats」が手がかりです。選択肢「Boarding information for a train to Busan.」は、設問で求められている情報と一致します。会話や説明文では、数字・場所・依頼・次の行動など、設問の種類に合う情報だけを狙って聞くのが有効です。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 「Announcement: Train to Busan」では、日本語に置き換えてから考えると遅れやすいので、設問の種類に合わせて数字・場所・依頼表現・次の行動を英語のまま拾いましょう。

questions.transcript: Attention conference participants. Please pick up your name badge at the registration desk before entering Hall A. Badges are required for all workshops and lunch sessions. If your badge contains an error, visit the information counter next to the main entrance.
questions.prompt: What is the announcement mainly about?
options: A. Picking up and using conference badges.
B. Changing the location of Hall A.
C. Registering for a lunch discount.
questions.explanationEn: The announcement explains where to pick up badges and when they are required.
questions.explanationKo: 안내 방송은 배지를 어디서 받고 언제 필요한지 설명합니다.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: conference participants, name badge, registration desk가 핵심 단서입니다.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: Pick up your name badge at the desk.
The registration desk is near the entrance.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: Pick up your name badge at the desk.

B. A new customer service policy.
questions.explanationEn: The announcement gives time, location, and preparation instructions for a training workshop.

Employees registered for the workshop should attend.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: The training workshop begins at 9 A.M.
